title: Number Theory & the Riemann Hypothesis
abstract: Investigating deep connections between the Riemann zeta function, the golden ratio φ, number fields ℚ(√5), and the Bost-Connes system. This research explores multiple perspectives on the Riemann Hypothesis through computational verification and analytical frameworks, including reformulations of Wyler's formula and strong log-concavity properties of the Riemann-Jacobi kernel.
author: Jian Zhou
